mapper.select:
SELECT m.member_idx, m.member_id, m.member_status, m.member_nick, m.member_name, m.member_phone, m.member_email, m.point_total FROM member m
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.member_id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.member_name
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.point_total
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.member_regdate
LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}

SELECT m.member_idx, m.member_id, m.member_status, m.member_nick, m.member_name, m.member_phone, m.member_email, m.point_total FROM member m WHERE m.member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR m.member_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.member_name
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.point_total
ORDER BY CASE WHEN m.member_status = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, m.member_regdate
LIMIT #{startRow}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE member_id LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR member_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR member_email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
